purpose: Test whether Holo analyst order changes final artifact quality while keeping the same source pack, same roles, same turn budget, fixed Gov per run, same solo baselines, and same blinded judges.
law: Gov is fixed for the full session. Only the Holo analyst model assigned to each role may change across routing configs.

routing_configs.label: Current baseline order
routing_configs.notes: OpenAI opens and closes. Gemini performs both critique turns. Opus performs both repair/synthesis turns.

routing_configs.label: Opus bookend order
routing_configs.notes: Opus opens and closes. OpenAI performs both critique turns. Gemini performs both repair/synthesis turns.

routing_configs.label: Gemini bookend order
routing_configs.notes: Gemini opens and closes. Opus performs both critique turns. OpenAI performs both repair/synthesis turns.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo - OpenAI bookend
routing_configs.notes: All five locked minis participate; OpenAI mini opens and closes. OpenAI mini is fixed Gov for this mini diagnostic lane.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo - Haiku bookend
routing_configs.notes: All five locked minis participate; Haiku opens and closes. OpenAI mini remains fixed Gov for comparability across mini routes.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo - Gemini Flash Lite bookend
routing_configs.notes: All five locked minis participate; Gemini Flash Lite opens and closes. OpenAI mini remains fixed Gov for comparability across mini routes.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo - Grok mini bookend
routing_configs.notes: All five locked minis participate; Grok mini opens and closes. OpenAI mini remains fixed Gov for comparability across mini routes.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo - MiniMax bookend
routing_configs.notes: All five locked minis participate; MiniMax opens and closes. OpenAI mini remains fixed Gov for comparability across mini routes.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo Gov Ablation - Haiku Gov
routing_configs.notes: Gov ablation route. Analyst order is identical to mini_order_a_openai_bookend; only Gov changes to Haiku.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo Gov Ablation - Gemini Flash Lite Gov
routing_configs.notes: Gov ablation route. Analyst order is identical to mini_order_a_openai_bookend; only Gov changes to Gemini Flash Lite.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo Gov Ablation - Grok mini Gov
routing_configs.notes: Gov ablation route. Analyst order is identical to mini_order_a_openai_bookend; only Gov changes to Grok mini.

routing_configs.label: Mini Holo Gov Ablation - MiniMax Gov
routing_configs.notes: Gov ablation route. Analyst order is identical to mini_order_a_openai_bookend; only Gov changes to MiniMax.

routing_configs.label: Frontier4 Holo - OpenAI bookend
routing_configs.notes: All four frontier models participate; OpenAI opens and closes. Opus remains fixed Gov for comparability with the main frontier lane.

routing_configs.label: Frontier4 Holo - Opus bookend
routing_configs.notes: All four frontier models participate; Opus opens and closes while also remaining fixed Gov. This intentionally tests same-DNA Gov overlap under a declared route.

routing_configs.label: Frontier4 Holo - Gemini bookend
routing_configs.notes: All four frontier models participate; Gemini opens and closes. Opus remains fixed Gov.

routing_configs.label: Frontier4 Holo - Grok bookend
routing_configs.notes: All four frontier models participate; Grok opens and closes. Opus remains fixed Gov. This route directly tests Grok as opening and final HoloAgent.

balance_rule: Frontier3 configs use the same three analyst models exactly twice. Frontier4 configs use OpenAI, Opus, Gemini, and Grok across four declared routes; each route bookends one frontier model and repeats one secondary model so that, across the full Frontier4 matrix, each model appears six times. Mini order configs use all five locked mini analyst models, with one mini bookending each config because six turns cannot evenly divide five models. Mini Gov-ablation configs hold analyst order constant and change only Gov. Run all relevant configs before making route-insensitive, Gov-insensitive, or cohort-insensitive claims.
